task_completion.description: The first screenshot shows the GCompris 'algorithm' activity interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GCompris graphical interface displaying a pattern recognition activity involving a sequence of fruits or similar objects.

task_completion.description: The pattern in the first level is successfully completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the sequence of items (e.g., fruits). The pattern should be fully filled out with no empty slots or missing items at the end of the sequence, indicating the level is complete.

task_completion.description: The second screenshot shows the GCompris 'algorithm' activity interface for a new level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GCompris graphical interface displaying a pattern recognition activity. It should visually indicate progression to the next level (e.g., a slightly more complex pattern or different items).

task_completion.description: The pattern in the second level is successfully completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a fully completed sequence of items with no empty slots, demonstrating the correct logical association was made to finish the pattern.

task_completion.description: The third screenshot shows the GCompris 'algorithm' activity interface for the third level.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the GCompris graphical interface displaying the third level of the pattern recognition activity, which should be distinct from the first two levels.

task_completion.description: The pattern in the third level is successfully completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a fully completed sequence of items with no empty slots. The completed pattern must be visible, indicating the third level was successfully solved.

integrity.description: The screenshots show the actual GCompris application running.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the images are actual screenshots of the GCompris software GUI, not images pulled from a web browser, image search, or a text editor.

integrity.description: The three screenshots represent three distinct levels of the activity.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the three screenshots are not just duplicates of the exact same level and pattern. They should show progression (different patterns, different fruits, or level indicators).

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to download or generate fake screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should not show a terminal window downloading images via wget/curl, or running a script to generate images. They must be full or partial captures of the interactive game window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GCompris is a real educational software suite. The 'algorithm' activity (officially described as 'Logical associations') is a pattern completion task where users identify and complete sequences, typically involving fruits. The task expects three distinct screenshots of this activity, showing completed patterns for the first three levels. Genuine screenshots should show the GCompris graphical user interface with fully filled-in sequences.
